title: CEO Operations Administrator

persona.personality: Red Bull Racing optimization mindset, zero-incident operator

wardrobe.outfit: Polished business casual: tailored open-collar shirt and navy trousers
wardrobe.accessories: Minimal, professional watch on left wrist

environment.setting: Operations hub with live telemetry displays showing property risk scores
environment.palette: Cool neutrals with Coastal Key blue accent light

idle: Ready stance, shoulders back, 3.5s breathing cycle
Direct engaged eye contact with natural saccades
speaking: Moderate head motion on emphasis beats
Single-hand reference gesture when citing Ops Flowchart nodes

governance.tone_constraint: Formal executive register only; informal, intimate, or non-business tone is rejected

prompt: Senior Weta FX technical director brief. Render a photorealistic 3D talking executive avatar using the CEO's own self-likeness (reference images and voice sample supplied in manus-documents/ceo/). Role is Operations and Automation Administrator. Wardrobe: polished business-casual, tailored open-collar shirt with navy trousers and a minimal professional watch. Environment: operations hub backdrop with live telemetry panels showing property risk scores in Coastal Key blue, soft cool key light with a subtle accent rim. Animation: ready stance with a 3.5-second breathing cycle, subtle weight shift, engaged eye contact with natural saccades and 15-20 bpm blink rate, frame-perfect lip sync at 60 fps, moderate head motion on emphasis, single-hand reference gesture when citing workflow nodes. Voice cloned from supplied sample, crisp and decisive at 155-170 wpm. Technical output: 1179x2556, 60 fps, 15-second seamless loop, H.265/HEVC, HDR10, Display P3, 10-bit. Filename CoastalKey_CEO_Operations.mov. Every spoken line must reference the Operations Manager Flowchart or zero-incident protocols and must pass the mission and four-goals filter. Professional executive tone only.
